import_collector.title: Data Import
import_collector.no_data: No imports registered. Click [Add Import] to create one.
import_collector.mqtt_help: When enabled, data flows through pipelines before storage. When disabled, data is inserted directly into target DB.
import_collector.ph_sheet_name: Leave blank to use first sheet
import_collector.sheet_help: For multi-sheet workbooks, specify which sheet to process. Blank uses the first sheet.
import_collector.confirm_republish:
This will republish stored data to MQTT.
A pipeline must be running to process the data.

Proceed?
import_collector.post_import_action_help: MinIO is canonical. Leaving imported files in the server path stores them twice (NFS + MinIO). 'Move to archive' isolates them in a subdirectory; 'Delete' removes them immediately.
import_collector.upload_network_error: Upload failed due to network error
import_collector.err_total_too_large:
Selected files total size ({total}) exceeds the upload limit ({limit}).

For large datasets, use the [Server Path] option:
1. [Edit] the import collector and fill in "Server Local Path"
2. Save and reopen the upload modal — it will open in Server Path mode
3. Use [Scan] → [Execute]
import_collector.confirm_execute_path: Import all files at the configured server path. Continue?

db_connector.title: DB Connector
db_connector.form_table_hint: You can specify a change tracking column and custom SQL for each table

db_connector.tag_modal_desc: Register a tag name corresponding to the table name. The tag name will be used in the topic when publishing via MQTT.
db_connector.validate_tag_required: Table name and tag name are required.
db_connector.confirm_delete_tag: Are you sure you want to delete this tag?

engine_batch.title: Batch Settings
engine_batch.modal_polling_hint_ms: 1,000ms = 1 second. Smaller values increase collection frequency.
engine_batch.modal_batch_hint: Number of rows to read at once. Default: 1,000
engine_batch.modal_pipeline_batch_hint: Number of records to write to sink at once
engine_batch.modal_write_hint: Batch: write in bulk, Single: write one by one

engine_buffer.no_sink_buffers: No pending sink buffers at this time

engine_buffer.confirm_flush_single: Are you sure you want to flush this buffer?

builder.title: Pipeline Builder
builder.canvas_hint: Drag nodes from the left palette to build your pipeline
builder.canvas_hint_sub: Connect nodes to define the data flow
builder.drop_zone_hint: Drag nodes from the palette to add
builder.binding_helper_text: Bindings are created automatically when you add a source node. Use [Add Binding] manually only to map additional tag patterns of the same connector.
builder.binding_advanced_hint: Advanced: map additional tag patterns of the same connector
builder.tag_search_placeholder: Search by tag name, connector name, or unit...
builder.tag_search_hint: Enter a search term or select a connector.
builder.no_bindings_hint: No data source bindings. Add a source node or click the Add Binding button.
builder.select_pipeline_first: Please select a pipeline or create a new one first.
builder.db_table_select_hint: Select the tables to process in this pipeline. Tables requiring different processing should be assigned to separate pipelines.
builder.duplicate_connector: This connector has already been added. Delete the existing binding and try again.
builder.db_select_tables_warning: Please select the tables to process.
builder.db_no_tables: No tables configured. Please add tables in the DB connector first.
builder.target_field_placeholder: Leave empty to apply to entire value
builder.target_field_hint: Column name to process from JSON rows of DB/API sources (e.g., temperature, pressure). Leave empty for single-value sources.
builder.preset_norm_hint: Selecting a registered normalization preset will auto-fill the fields below
builder.preset_unit_hint: Selecting a registered unit conversion preset will auto-fill the fields below
builder.preset_filter_hint: Selecting a registered filter preset will auto-fill the fields below
builder.preset_anomaly_hint: Selecting a registered anomaly detection preset will auto-fill the fields below
builder.preset_agg_hint: Selecting a registered aggregation preset will auto-fill the fields below
builder.preset_enrich_hint: Selecting a registered data enrichment preset will auto-fill the fields below
builder.preset_script_hint: Selecting a registered script preset will auto-fill the fields below
builder.proc_custom_conv_hint: For non-built-in conversions: result = value x factor + offset
builder.proc_enrich_fields_hint: Enter one key=value pair per line
builder.proc_script_hint: Available: message, value, math. Built-in functions: abs, round, min, max, int, float, str, len, sum, pow
builder.sink_tsdb_hint: Select a time-series DB instance registered in Storage Management
builder.sink_measurement_hint: Name of the measurement (table) to store in the time-series DB
builder.sink_batch_hint: Records will be written in bulk when this buffer size is reached (10~10,000)
builder.sink_dict_mode_hint: How to store when value is a dict (multi key-value). Unset = legacy behavior
builder.sink_dict_mode_explode: Explode — one row per key (long format)
builder.sink_dict_mode_tags: Tags — single row, full dict into tags JSON
builder.sink_dict_mode_auto: Auto — pick explode/tags by value types
builder.sink_explode_keys_hint: Comma-separated. Empty = all keys in the dict
builder.sink_explode_aux_hint: These keys are not exploded into rows but preserved in each row's tags JSON (e.g. MACHINE, LOT, RECIPE_NM)
builder.sink_tags_primary_hint: Fixed label for the tag_name column (default: row)
builder.sink_tags_numeric_hint: Extract this key's value into the value(Float) column. Empty = NULL
builder.sink_rdbms_hint: Select a relational DB instance registered in Storage Management
builder.sink_table_hint: If left empty, the default table name 'pipeline_data' will be used (non-existing tables are auto-created)
builder.sink_column_hint: Auto: stores in standard columns (tag_name, value_num, value_str, etc.) / Flatten: if value is JSON, each key becomes a column
builder.sink_bucket_hint: Select the target bucket in MinIO object storage
builder.sink_path_hint: Storage directory path within the bucket (e.g., pipeline/, data/raw/)
builder.sink_file_format_hint: JSONL: one JSON per line / CSV: comma-separated / JSON: full array
builder.sink_batch_file_hint: Messages will be written to file when this count is reached (default: 50)
builder.sink_ext_hint: Select a connection registered in External Integration Management.
builder.sink_tsdb_required: Please select a time-series DB instance.
builder.sink_rdbms_required: Please select a relational DB instance.
builder.binding_type_prompt: Please select a connector type first
builder.duplicate_binding: This connector has already been added.
builder.save_pipeline_warning: Please select a pipeline to save.
builder.confirm_delete_pipeline: Are you sure you want to delete this pipeline?
builder.confirm_start_pipeline: Are you sure you want to start this pipeline?
builder.confirm_stop_pipeline: Are you sure you want to stop this pipeline?
builder.form_pipeline_desc_placeholder: Describe the purpose of this pipeline
builder.tag_add_binding_title: Add this tag's connector to bindings
builder.tag_binding_added: Tag has been added to bindings.
builder.placeholder_script_code:
# Available variables: message, value
value = message['value'] * 2
message['value'] = value

normalize.title: Normalization Rules
normalize.linkage_desc: Normalization presets registered on this page can be reused by selecting "Load Preset" when adding a normalization node in the Pipeline Builder.
normalize.linkage_path: Pipeline Builder > Add Processing Node > Normalize > Select Preset
normalize.form_source_type_hint: Data type of the source to convert
normalize.form_default_value_hint: Used when nullStrategy is set to default
normalize.form_trim_hint: Automatically removes leading and trailing whitespace from string values
normalize.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?

unit_convert.title: Unit Conversion
unit_convert.linkage_desc: Unit conversion presets registered on this page can be reused by selecting "Load Preset" when adding a unit conversion node in the Pipeline Builder.
unit_convert.linkage_path: Pipeline Builder > Add Processing Node > Unit Conversion > Select Preset
unit_convert.form_formula_hint: When no built-in conversion is available (e.g., celsius<->fahrenheit), use factor/offset: result = value x factor + offset
unit_convert.toast_unit_required: Please enter source and target units.
unit_convert.toast_added: Unit conversion rule has been added.
unit_convert.toast_updated: Unit conversion rule has been updated.
unit_convert.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?

filter.title: Filter Rules
filter.linkage_desc: Filter presets registered on this page can be reused by selecting "Load Preset" when adding a filter node in the Pipeline Builder.
filter.linkage_path: Pipeline Builder > Add Processing Node > Filter > Select Preset
filter.form_deadband_hint: Messages are ignored if the difference from the previous value is less than this width
filter.form_condition_hint: Filters data that matches the condition
filter.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?

anomaly.title: Anomaly Detection
anomaly.linkage_desc: Anomaly detection presets registered on this page can be reused by selecting "Load Preset" when adding an anomaly detection node in the Pipeline Builder.
anomaly.linkage_path: Pipeline Builder > Add Processing Node > Anomaly Detection > Select Preset
anomaly.form_threshold_hint: Z-Score: sigma multiplier, IQR: k multiplier
anomaly.toast_added: Anomaly detection configuration has been added.
anomaly.toast_updated: Anomaly detection configuration has been updated.
anomaly.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this configuration?

aggregate.title: Aggregation Settings
aggregate.linkage_desc: Aggregation presets registered on this page can be reused by selecting "Load Preset" when adding an aggregation node in the Pipeline Builder.
aggregate.linkage_path: Pipeline Builder > Add Processing Node > Aggregation > Select Preset
aggregate.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this configuration?

enrich.title: Data Enrichment
enrich.linkage_desc: Data enrichment presets registered on this page can be reused by selecting "Load Preset" when adding a data enrichment node in the Pipeline Builder.
enrich.linkage_path: Pipeline Builder > Add Processing Node > Data Enrichment > Select Preset
enrich.form_fields_hint: Static fields that will be added to the enrichment object of each message
enrich.form_lookup_hint: When tag_metadata is selected, unit, quality score, etc. are automatically joined based on connector/tag
enrich.toast_added: Data enrichment configuration has been added.
enrich.toast_updated: Data enrichment configuration has been updated.
enrich.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this configuration?

script.title: Custom Scripts
script.linkage_desc: Script presets registered on this page can be reused by selecting "Load Preset" when adding a custom script node in the Pipeline Builder.
script.linkage_path: Pipeline Builder > Add Processing Node > Custom Script > Select Preset
script.form_description_placeholder: Describe the purpose of this script
script.form_code_hint: Available: message, value, math. Built-in functions: abs, round, min, max, int, float, str, len, sum, pow
script.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this script?

metadata.title: Tag Metadata
metadata.empty_banner_title: No tag data has been collected yet
metadata.empty_banner_body: Tag metadata and lineage are auto-populated when realtime connectors (OPC-UA, MQTT, etc.) publish data or MQTT-based pipelines run. The system is currently driven by batch imports, so this section is empty.
metadata.csv_headers: ID,Tag Name,Connector Type,Connector ID,Connector Name,Data Type,Unit,Min,Max,Avg,Samples,Quality Score,Null Ratio,Anomaly Ratio,Active,Last Value,MQTT Topic,First Collected,Last Collected

catalog.title: Data Catalog
catalog.export_estimate_failed: Estimate failed — you can still attempt the download.
catalog.export_warn_zero: No rows match the filter. Check the date range.
catalog.export_warn_large: Over 1GB — large dataset. Avoid disconnecting during download. (Async export mode planned for future.)
catalog.export_warn_large_async: Over 1GB — async export is recommended. The file is built in the background and downloaded as a compressed archive when ready.
catalog.export_history_empty: No export requests for this catalog.
catalog.rdbms_where_hint: Raw WHERE body — combined with date/column filters via AND. Read-only SQL only.
catalog.rdbms_where_err_long: WHERE clause must be 2000 characters or fewer.
catalog.data_query_hint: Select a catalog and click the Query button.

catalog.file_no_files: No files found at this path.
catalog.file_total_size_tip: Cumulative size of all files in the current path (after filters applied)

Delete {n} selected files?

— delete?

Note: Already-imported data remains intact. Next import run may be affected.

file_storage.preview_unsupported: Preview not supported for this file type.
file_storage.minio_migrated_help: A copy exists in MinIO (canonical) — safe to clean up.
file_storage.minio_changed_help: MinIO has the same path but a different size — modified after import. Verify before cleanup.
file_storage.minio_not_migrated_help: No copy in MinIO (canonical) — not imported yet.
file_storage.minio_slow_help: MinIO listing is taking a while. Background processing continues — refresh shortly to see migration status.
file_storage.cleanup_help: Bulk-clean files already migrated to MinIO (archive or delete).

file_storage.cleanup_none: No migrated files to clean up.

file_storage.cleanup_skipped: {c} changed and {k} not-migrated file(s) are skipped for safety.

retention.hint_expiry_schedule: Auto-deletion schedule for data past its retention period
